message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title SDP Initiated Request/Response Pattern with Correlation ID

participant "SERVER NODE 1" as Node1
participant "SERVER NODE 2" as Node2
participant "STATE CACHE" as Cache
participant "BROKER" as Broker
participant "APP" as App

group SDP
    participant "SERVER NODE 1" as Node1
    participant "SERVER NODE 2" as Node2
    participant "STATE CACHE" as Cache
    participant "BROKER" as Broker
end

group TBM/HU
    participant "APP" as App
end

Node1 -> Node1: new request/response interaction
activate Node1
Node1 -> Node1: create interaction context
Node1 -> Cache: newMessageID = nextMessageID()
Node1 -> Cache: put(newMessageID, interaction context)
Node1 -> Node1: create message
Node1 -> Node1: message.messageID = newMessageID
Node1 -> Broker: publish message
deactivate Node1

Broker -> App: read message
activate App
App -> App: create response
App -> App: response.correlationID = message.messageID
App -> Broker: publish response
deactivate App

Broker -> Node2: read response
activate Node2
Node2 -> Cache: interaction context = get(response.correlationID)
Node2 -> Node2: process response
Node2 -> Cache: delete(response.correlationID)
deactivate Node2

@enduml
```
